{{Infobox location
| name = Akura guest tower
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] could have traveled from the [[Akura guest tower]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The cloudship dock is located outside the [[Akura guest tower]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura guest tower]] contains training facilities.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
